_description: Reusable extraction template for SSA referral forms. Maps form structure to extraction rules. Intended to be adaptable for future clients with similar government PDF extraction needs.
_status: skeleton — populate after extraction engine development and field mapping
_notes: This template becomes the production extraction config. Each rule maps a field name to a specific extraction method (bbox, regex, table cell, etc.). Uses PDFBox for text/coordinate extraction and Tabula-java for table extraction.
